name: Retro Pixel Custom Frame
description: A blocky, 8-bit styled custom photo frame. Share a photo with us during checkout and watch us transform it into beautiful, physical pixel art!
specifications: Color: White | Product Length: 8 Inch | Product Breadth: 0.5 Inch | Product Height: 12 Inch | Weight: 100 g | Material: Plastic | Type: Digital Photo Frame | Generic Name: Photo Frames | Country of Origin: India | Net Quantity (N): 1
faqs: How do I send my photo? | After checkout, you will be redirected to WhatsApp. Send your high-res photo to us directly in the chat, and we will send you a digital mockup for approval before printing!

name: Arcade Name Keychain
description: A custom dual-layered laser-cut acrylic keychain styled like a retro arcade name badge. Your name is engraved in a blocky 8-bit gaming font.

faqs: Is there a protective film? | Yes! Acrylic keychains are shipped with a thin protective plastic film on both sides to prevent scratches. Please peel it off to reveal the glossy color!
